name: Suspicious Appended Extension
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ((LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.doc' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.docx' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.jpeg' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.jpg' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.lnk' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.pdf' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.png' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.pst' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.rtf' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.xls' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.xlsx') AND (LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.doc.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.docx.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.jpeg.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.jpg.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.lnk.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.pdf.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.png.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.pst.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.rtf.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.xls.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.xlsx.%')) AND (NOT((LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.backup' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.bak' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.old' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.orig' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.temp' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.tmp'))) AND (NOT((LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%:\programdata\anaconda3\%' AND LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.c~'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Appended Extension on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ((LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.doc' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.docx' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.jpeg' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.jpg' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.lnk' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.pdf' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.png' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.pst' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.rtf' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.xls' OR LOWER(filename) LIKE '%.xlsx') AND (LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.doc.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.docx.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.jpeg.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.jpg.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.lnk.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.pdf.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.png.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.pst.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.rtf.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.xls.%' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.xlsx.%')) AND (NOT((LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.backup' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.bak' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.old' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.orig' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.temp' OR LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.tmp'))) AND (NOT((LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%:\programdata\anaconda3\%' AND LOWER(Filename) LIKE '%.c~'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
